evals.name: eval-util-config
evals.prompt: Review the code in chester-util-config/ for smells
evals.expected_output: A smell report scoped to chester-util-config/ covering its 2 shell scripts, with file:line citations

evals.name: eval-plan-smell
evals.expected_output: A smell report scoped to chester-plan-smell/ — should handle a single large markdown file gracefully, possibly noting it's not traditional code

evals.name: eval-execute-write
evals.expected_output: A smell report scoped to chester-execute-write/ covering 5 files (SKILL.md + 4 agent reference docs), with structural findings about the skill's organization
